articles.title: Leafs' Auston Matthews Out for Season After Knee Injury
articles.summary: Toronto Maple Leafs captain Auston Matthews will miss the remainder of the 2025-26 NHL season due to a knee injury sustained in a game against the Anaheim Ducks. Matthews will be re-evaluated in two weeks.

articles.title: Cincinnati Fires Men's Basketball Coach Wes Miller After 5 Seasons
articles.summary: Cincinnati has fired men's basketball coach Wes Miller after five seasons, citing the team's inability to reach the NCAA tournament. Miller's contract states that he is owed $9.9 million if fired before March 31, 2026.

articles.title: Titans Release CB L'Jarius Sneed, Clear $11.4M in Cap Space
articles.summary: The Tennessee Titans are releasing cornerback L'Jarius Sneed, saving $11.4 million in cap space. Sneed struggled with injuries during his time with the team.

articles.title: 2026 NFL Free Agency Live Updates: Signings, Trades, Cuts
articles.summary: The 2026 NFL free agency period has begun, with several key signings and trades already taking place. The Baltimore Ravens have agreed to terms with edge rusher Trey Hendrickson, while quarterback Malik Willis is joining the Miami Dolphins and Tua Tagovailoa is signing with the Atlanta Falcons.
